compounds.frequency: weekly (implied by 7-day cycle with refeed day)

benefits.description: Burning fat as part of weight loss journey

side_effects.description: Complete fatigue and hunger crash without a refeed day on day 7 of cycle

protocol_notes: Has been on Monjaro/Zepbound since release with one year off due to insurance. Uses day 7 as a refeed day to prevent fatigue and hunger crash. Emphasizes electrolytes, hydration, and strength training alongside GLP-1 use.
